faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Old Westbury typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. Larger estates may require additional services. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Old Westbury homes?
faqs.answer: We offer multiple treatment options including heat treatment, chemical applications, and integrated pest management approaches. For Old Westbury's luxury homes with delicate furnishings and antiques, we often recommend heat treatment as it's highly effective, chemical-free, and safe for valuable items. Our technicians will recommend the best method for your specific situation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to bed bug issues in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: We understand the urgency of bed bug infestations and typically offer same-day or next-day service for Old Westbury residents. Our team is familiar with the area and can quickly reach properties throughout the village, including estates off I-495 and near Glen Cove Road, to begin inspection and treatment.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatment results?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty on all bed bug treatments. Our service includes follow-up inspections to ensure complete elimination, and if bed bugs return within the warranty period, we will re-treat your Old Westbury property at no additional charge. We're committed to 100% customer satisfaction.
